tagline: Turn chaos into one smart route.

designSystem.style: Dark-first logistics dashboard with teal-green accent. Timeline-style route sequencing, map visualization with route line SVG, micro-interaction press states, and animated toast notifications. Clean card-based layout with category color-coding and urgency badges.

screens: Today – Smart route overview with optimized stop sequence, stats, start/recalculate route actions
Route – Map visualization with SVG route lines, stop dots, and scrollable stop sequence drawer
Errands – Categorized errand list with filter chips, add errand modal, urgency badges
Insights – Time saved stats, weekly activity bar chart, learned habits, nearby suggestions
Settings – Profile, dark/light theme toggle, sync integrations, learning preferences
